title: Optional password authentication
description:
Implement password auth:
- Check for Authorization header or password query param
- Return 401 if password required but missing/wrong
- Allow password to be set via --web-password flag

title: HTTP server with WebSocket upgrade
description:
Implement HTTP server that:
- Listens on configurable host/port
- Serves health check endpoint (/health)
- Handles WebSocket upgrade requests
- No browser opening, just listens and reports URL

title: WebSocket transport implementation
description:
Implement WebSocket message handling for ACP:
- Handle WebSocket upgrade from HTTP
- Parse JSON-RPC messages
- Send responses over WebSocket
- Handle notifications (no response needed)
- Support request ID tracking for responses

title: ACP handler integration
description:
Implement ACP method handlers for WebSocket transport:
- session_new: Create new session
- session_prompt: Send prompt to session
- session_end: End session
- session/list: List sessions
- session/update_metadata: Update session
- Handle all ACP protocol methods

title: /web slash command for interactive server start
description:
Implement /web command that:
- Starts web server from within pi
- Prompts for port (default: random)
- Prompts for host (default: 127.0.0.1)
- Prompts for password (optional)
- Outputs URL when started
- Clean shutdown on /exit or Ctrl+C
